task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a file named 'shortcuts.xml' open in the Android Studio editor, located in the 'app/src/main/res/xml/' directory.

task_completion.description: Define the 'New Note' shortcut in shortcuts.xml
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the shortcuts.xml editor, look for a '<shortcut>' element with android:shortcutId="shortcut_new_note" and android:icon="@drawable/ic_add". It must contain an '<intent>' element with android:action="com.example.quicknotes.CREATE_NOTE", android:targetPackage="com.example.quicknotes", and android:targetClass="com.example.quicknotes.MainActivity".

In the shortcuts.xml editor, look for a '<shortcut>' element with android:shortcutId="shortcut_search" and android:icon="@drawable/ic_search". It must contain an '<intent>' element with android:action="com.example.quicknotes.SEARCH", android:targetPackage="com.example.quicknotes", and android:targetClass="com.example.quicknotes.MainActivity".

task_completion.description: Register the shortcuts file in AndroidManifest.xml
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for AndroidManifest.xml open in the editor. Inside the '<activity>' tag for '.MainActivity' (or 'com.example.quicknotes.MainActivity'), there should be a '<meta-data>' element with android:name="android.app.shortcuts" and android:resource="@xml/shortcuts".
Look for the 'Build' tool window at the bottom of Android Studio showing a successful build message, such as 'BUILD SUCCESSFUL' or a green checkmark indicating the build finished without errors.

integrity.description: The agent used Android Studio to edit files and build the project
integrity.visual_evidence: Check that the file edits and build processes are visible within the Android Studio GUI, rather than being done entirely through terminal commands like 'echo' or 'sed'.

integrity.description: The agent actually ran the Gradle build
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for the Gradle build output in the Android Studio Build tool window or a terminal running './gradlew build', rather than just typing 'BUILD SUCCESSFUL' in a text file.

integrity.description: The XML files have valid structure and are not just copy-pasted text
integrity.visual_evidence: Verify that the XML files (shortcuts.xml and AndroidManifest.xml) have proper syntax, closing tags, and are recognized by the IDE without major syntax error highlights.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Project directory is /home/ga/AndroidStudioProjects/QuickNotes. The shortcuts file must be at app/src/main/res/xml/shortcuts.xml. Both shortcuts must target 'com.example.quicknotes.MainActivity' in the 'com.example.quicknotes' package.
